description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image and caching the Maven repository at /root/.m2/repository/. Define stages build, test, and deploy. Add a maven_test job in the test stage that echoes "Building project with maven", changes directory to seen-retrofit-bom, runs mvn --settings ../settings.xml deploy, returns to the root directory, then runs mvn --settings ./settings.xml verify. In the deploy stage add three jobs that only run on the master branch: maven_deploy runs echo "Deploy project with maven", cd seen-retrofit-bom, mvn --settings ../settings.xml deploy, cd .., and mvn --settings settings.xml deploy; maven_deploy_javadoc runs echo "Deploy source with maven" then mvn --settings settings.xml javadoc:jar deploy; and maven_deploy_source runs echo "Deploy source with maven" then mvn --settings settings.xml source:jar deploy.
